title: A Rover's Song.
content:
Snowdrift of the mountains,
    Spindrift of the sea,
    We who down the border
    Rove from gloom to glee,--

    Snowdrift of the mountains,
    Spindrift of the sea,
    There be no such gypsies
    Over earth as we.

    Snowdrift of the mountains,
    Spindrift of the sea,
    Let us part the treasure
    Of the world in three.

    Snowdrift of the mountains,
    Spindrift of the sea,
    You shall keep your kingdoms;
    Joscelyn for me!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Bliss Carman (William) delivers a powerful performance in "A Rover's Song."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
